title: Pi Hooks Configuration
description: Schema for hooks.json files used by Pi Hooks, based on Pi lifecycle events and handlers.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this hooks file.

hooks.description: Hook event registrations grouped by Pi lifecycle event.

project_trust.description: Runs when Pi evaluates project trust.

resources_discover.description: Runs when Pi gathers extra resource paths after session start.

session_start.description: Runs when a Pi session starts.

session_before_fork.description: Runs before Pi forks a session.

session_before_compact.description: Runs before Pi compacts the current session.

session_shutdown.description: Runs when Pi is shutting down.

session_before_tree.description: Runs before Pi prepares a session tree view.

session_tree.description: Runs when Pi renders or updates a session tree view.

context.description: Runs when Pi derives the current context state.

before_provider_request.description: Runs before Pi sends a provider request.

before_provider_headers.description: Runs before Pi finalizes provider request headers.

after_provider_response.description: Runs after Pi receives a provider response.

before_agent_start.description: Runs before an agent starts processing.

agent_settled.description: Runs when an agent has settled after work completes.

turn_start.description: Runs when a new turn starts.

message_start.description: Runs when a message starts streaming.

message_update.description: Runs while a message continues streaming.

message_end.description: Runs when a message finishes streaming.

tool_execution_start.description: Runs when Pi starts executing a tool.

tool_execution_update.description: Runs while Pi is updating tool execution progress.

tool_execution_end.description: Runs when Pi finishes executing a tool.

model_select.description: Runs when Pi selects a model.

thinking_level_select.description: Runs when Pi selects a thinking level.

tool_call.description: Runs when the agent calls a tool.

tool_result.description: Runs when a tool returns a result.

user_bash.description: Runs when the user asks Pi to run a bash command.

input.description: Runs when Pi receives raw input.

matcher.description: Matcher string that filters when a matcher group fires. Omit matcher, use an empty string, or use * to match all. Plain literals such as read match exactly. Pipe-separated literals such as edit|write mean exact alternatives. Patterns with regex metacharacters such as ^read$ are treated as regex.

hooks.description: Handlers to run when this matcher group matches.

type.description: Only command handlers are supported by Pi Hooks.

command.description: Command to execute with the Pi session working directory as cwd.

statusMessage.description: Optional status text shown while the handler runs.
